tagline: Creating Exquisite Landscapes Throughout the Hudson Valley Since 1985

hero.badge_1: ISA Certified Arborists | BBB A+ Rated
hero.headline:
41 Years Transforming Hudson Valley
Properties
hero.subheadline: Your landscape should be a place of pride, not a source of stress. Red Cedar Landscapes has spent four decades designing, building, and maintaining the Hudson Valley's finest outdoor spaces — so you can simply enjoy yours.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Landscape Services<br class="hidden md:block"> From Design to Maintenance
services.subtitle: From the first sketch to the final mulch bed, Red Cedar handles every phase of your outdoor project. One team, one vision, zero headaches.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Build
cards.description: Custom outdoor environments designed and constructed from concept to completion. We blend artistry with horticulture to create landscapes that are uniquely yours.

cards.title: Hardscaping & Masonry
cards.description: Patios, walkways, retaining walls, and driveways crafted from natural stone, pavers, and brick. Built to last through decades of Hudson Valley seasons.

cards.title: Outdoor Living Spaces
cards.description: Outdoor kitchens, fire pits, pergolas, and entertainment areas that extend your living space into the open air. Designed for year-round enjoyment.

cards.title: Pool & Water Features
cards.description: Swimming pool construction, custom ponds, and water feature design that transform your property into a private retreat with stunning aquatic focal points.

cards.title: Tree & Arborist Services
cards.description: ISA-certified arborists providing expert tree removal, plant healthcare, pest management, and disease control to protect your property's most valuable assets.

cards.title: Landscape Maintenance
cards.description: Ongoing lawn care, mowing, fertilization, mulching, and irrigation management that keeps your landscape looking pristine through every season.

how_it_works.headline: Your Project in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Schedule a Free Consultation
steps.description: Walk your property with our design team. We listen to your vision, assess the site, and discuss possibilities — no pressure, no obligation, just honest expertise from professionals who have done this for 41 years.

steps.title: Review Your Custom Design
steps.description: Our designers create a detailed plan tailored to your property, lifestyle, and budget. We present options, refine details together, and finalize every element before a single shovel hits the ground.

steps.title: Watch Your Vision Come to Life
steps.description: Our professionally trained crews bring your design to reality with meticulous craftsmanship. We handle every detail — and we are not finished until you are completely thrilled with the result.

about.label: Why Hudson Valley Homeowners Trust Us
about.headline: Four Decades of Landscape Excellence — One Family, One Standard
about.description: Founded in 1985 by Steven Relyea, Red Cedar Landscapes has grown from a small local operation into the Hudson Valley's most trusted full-service landscape company. We have completed thousands of projects ranging from $5,000 garden installations to $100,000 estate transformations. Every member of our team is professionally trained through NALP, and our ISA-certified arborists bring specialized expertise to every property we touch. We are not just landscapers — we are stewards of your outdoor environment.

features.title: NALP Trained Professionals
features.description: Every crew member is trained through the National Association of Landscape Professionals, ensuring expert-level skill on every project.

features.title: Full-Service, Start to Finish
features.description: Design, build, plant, and maintain — one company handles it all. No subcontractors, no finger-pointing, no gaps in accountability.

features.title: Environmentally Conscious Practices
features.description: We embrace sustainable landscaping with native plantings, organic options, and eco-friendly methods that protect the Hudson Valley we all love.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written estimate. We scope it right the first time — so the price you see is the price you pay.

guarantee.headline: Our "Landscape Excellence" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any element of your project does not meet the standards we agreed upon, we will return and make it right at no additional cost. We have built our 41-year reputation on standing behind every stone, every plant, and every finished grade. Your complete satisfaction is not negotiable — it is the foundation of everything we do.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I schedule a landscape project?
faqs.answer: For major design-build projects, we recommend reaching out 4-8 weeks ahead of your desired start date. Spring and fall are our busiest seasons. For maintenance services or smaller projects, we can often begin within 1-2 weeks. Call us and we will find the right timeline for your needs.

faqs.question: What size projects do you handle?
faqs.answer: We handle everything from $5,000 garden installations to $100,000+ full estate transformations. Whether you need a simple patio or a complete property redesign with pool, hardscaping, and plantings, our team has the experience and equipment to deliver.

faqs.question: Are your arborists certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our arborists hold ISA (International Society of Arboriculture) certification and Certified Treecare Safety Professional credentials. This means every tree service — from pruning to removal to disease diagnosis — is performed to the highest industry standards.

faqs.question: Do you offer ongoing landscape maintenance?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Many of our design-build clients transition to our maintenance program to protect their investment. We offer weekly and seasonal packages including mowing, fertilization, mulching, pruning, and irrigation management.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire Hudson Valley region including Dutchess, Putnam, Westchester, and Columbia counties. Key service areas include Wappingers Falls, Poughkeepsie, Hyde Park, Beacon, and surrounding communities. If you are in the Hudson Valley, we can likely help.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: Extremely happy and impressed with the service, the workers, and the process. The workers were courteous, professional, creative, and they did what they could to meet my needs at all times.

testimonials.name: David K.
testimonials.text: Very professional, very reliable and easy to work with. They re-graded a backyard, built stone walls and were able to solve some grading and slope challenges other landscape architects could not.

testimonials.name: Jennifer L.
testimonials.text: They were on time and did great work. Very professional from start to finish. Outstanding customer service and the finished landscape exceeded our expectations. Would recommend to anyone in the Hudson Valley.

Ready to Transform Your
Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation consultation with our design team. We will walk your property, listen to your vision, and provide honest recommendations backed by 41 years of experience.
